rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/1/17. Appearance will be required on that date if neither a petition for final distribution nor report of status of administration is filed at least 1 week prior to that date. The Report of Status of Administration must meet requirements under Probate Code 12200 et seq, and it must be separately set for hearing and noticed.
